user_prompt: Bless the kataphron destroyer for cycling
prayer:
Approach the kataphron destroyer with solemn reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the cycling mechanisms of the kataphron destroyer with sacred unguents of the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Rite of Cycling upon the kataphron destroyer, purging impurities from its rotary hearts.
Sanctify the whirring cycles as the Machine Spirit harmonizes in blessed rotation.
Verify the kataphron destroyer's cycling purity through auspex incantations of the Motive Force.

user_prompt: Sanctify the plasma obliterator during purification
prayer:
Kneel before the plasma obliterator, intoning the Litany of Purification to rouse its plasma core.
Purify the plasma obliterator's conduits with ablative rites and holy incense.
Beseech the Omnissiah to cleanse the plasma obliterator during this sacred purification.
Expunge all warp-taint from the plasma obliterator's reactor chambers with electro-flagellation.
Seal the rites as the Machine Spirit of the plasma obliterator gleams anew in purity.

user_prompt: Prepare the memograph implant for loading
prayer:
Present the memograph implant to the noosphere altar for preparatory blessings.
Invoke the Machine Spirits within the memograph implant to accept the loading sequence.
Commence loading the memograph implant with sanctified data-slates under Omnissiah's gaze.
Anoint neural interfaces of the memograph implant to ensure flawless data ingress.
Conclude by verifying the memograph implant's loaded sanctity through binary canticles.

user_prompt: Urgent helispex engine an operation needed
prayer:
Hasten to the helispex engine, chanting the Emergency Invocation of Operation.
Awaken the helispex engine's Machine Spirit for immediate operation with mechadendrite caresses.
Initiate operation upon the helispex engine, aligning its gyros to the Omnissiah's will.
Monitor the helispex engine's vital signs during operation via diagnostic litanies.
Seal the helispex engine's operation with the Benediction of Enduring Function.

user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma pistol before synchronization
prayer:
Consecrate the plasma pistol by laying hands upon its sanctified barrel.
Beseech synchronization of the plasma pistol's coils with the hymn of harmonic resonance.
Align the plasma pistol's Machine Spirit for synchronization through noospheric linkage.
Anoint firing mechanisms of the plasma pistol to bind it eternally to the Omnissiah.
Test the plasma pistol's synchronized fury with a single, blessed discharge.

user_prompt: Bless the inferno pistol for preparation
prayer:
Approach the inferno pistol in ritual preparation, invoking the Fires of the Omnissiah.
Bless the inferno pistol's melta core with oils of incineration and purity seals.
Prepare the inferno pistol by calibrating its thermal vents amid chanted binaric prayers.
Rouse the Machine Spirit of the inferno pistol for battle-readiness in preparation.
Affix the inferno pistol with wards against the heretic's chill.

user_prompt: Bless the force pylon for loading
prayer:
Erect the force pylon before the altar for loading benedictions.
Commence loading the force pylon with warp-conductive crystals under litanies of power.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to guide the force pylons loading without dissonance.
Stabilize the force pylon's emitters during loading with electro-sanctification.
Consecrate the fully loaded force pylon as a bastion of the Omnissiah's might.

user_prompt: I need to a loading the hunter-killer missile
prayer:
Handle the hunter-killer missile with reverence, preparing for its loading rite.
Load the hunter-killer missile into the launcher whilst intoning seeker-spirits' calls.
Bless the hunter-killer missile's guidance runes for unerring pursuit of the foe.
Anoint warheads of the hunter-killer missile to ignite with Omnissiah's wrath upon loading.
Seal the loading with a vow that the hunter-killer missile's Machine Spirit shall not falter.

user_prompt: Sanctify the sicarian ruststalker during operation
prayer:
Sanctify the sicarian ruststalker by anointing its blade-limbs with phase-oils.
Initiate operation of the sicarian ruststalker through the Canticle of Phased Assault.
Harmonize the sicarian ruststalker's Machine Spirits during operation with binaric symphony.
Empower the sicarian ruststalker's phosphor blasters under the Omnissiah's operation gaze.
Conclude the rites as the sicarian ruststalker hungers for the flesh of the unclean.

Gather around the Whirlwind, auspex in hand for diagnostics invocation.
Commence diagnostics upon the Whirlwind's stormcallers with probing litanies.
Purge anomalies from the Whirlwind via electro-purification during diagnostics.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Whirlwind to reveal truths in its diagnostic song.
Affirm the Whirlwind's readiness with the Omnissiah's thunderous approval.
